title: crassula alticola
intro: Crassula alticola, also known as the mountain crassula, is a species of succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in South Africa to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Crassula alticola include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infused in oil to be used as a topical treatment for skin issues and as a digestive aid.
